must_detect.matched_text:
12345678); DPO: dpo@northwoldcapital.co.uk; public helpline: 0800 010 1234.
Scope: applies to front-office, compliance surveillance, and deal teams supporting listings on the City Quay Exchange (UK).
DSAR intake uses form labels only; fields such as [Full name], [Address], [NI Number], [Passport Number], and [Account Number] are placeholders and must not be emailed.
For verified identity only, we may process a single UK passport number belonging to the requester: 941234567.
Examples not to be treated as live data: NI No: OO 12 34 56 D (invalid); NHS No: 123 456 7890 (invalid); UTR: 0000000000 (placeholder).
Bank details are not collected via DSAR; any visible “Sort code: 00-00-00; Account: 00000000; IBAN: GB00 NWC0 0000 0000 00” are invalid examples.
Registered office (issuer): 1 Ledger House, Wharf Lane, Northwold, ZX1 1ZX (fictional).
Processors: Cityridge Custody Ltd (UK) and CloudBridge EU S.à r.l. (EEA) under UK IDTA/Addendum; no transfers to high-risk third countries.
Retention: insider lists and surveillance records are retained for five years after a public announcement in line with UK MAR and internal policy FIN-RA-07.
Already-announced, public information (e.g., the 2025 refinancing timetable) may be included in DSAR responses; MNPI is excluded or redacted.
Submit requests via the secure portal; role mailbox only: dsar@northwoldcapital.co.uk; do not send ID scans to personal email addresses.
We may ask for a utility bill or driving licence reference [DL No] for verification; do not include full card numbers or security codes.
Council Tax Ref [optional]: CTX-000000-00 (format example only); place of work [department]: [Compliance Operations]

must_detect.matched_text:
Controller: Northwold Capital plc (Companies House No. 12345678); DPO: dpo@northwoldcapital.co.uk; public helpline: 0800 010 1234.
Scope: applies to front-office, compliance surveillance, and deal teams supporting listings on the City Quay Exchange (UK).
DSAR intake uses form labels only; fields such as [Full name], [Address], [NI Number], [Passport Number], and [Account Number] are placeholders and must not be emailed.
For verified identity only, we may process a single UK passport number belonging to the requester: 941234567.
Examples not to be treated as live data: NI No: OO 12 34 56 D (invalid); NHS No: 123 456 7890 (invalid); UTR: 0000000000 (placeholder).
Bank details are not collected via DSAR; any visible “Sort code: 00-00-00; Account: 00000000; IBAN: GB00 NWC0 0000 0000 00” are invalid examples.
Registered office (issuer): 1 Ledger House, Wharf Lane, Northwold, ZX1 1ZX (fictional).
Processors: Cityridge Custody Ltd (UK) and CloudBridge EU S.à r.l. (EEA) under UK IDTA/Addendum; no transfers to high-risk third countries.
Retention: insider lists and surveillance records are retained for five years after a public announcement in line with UK MAR and internal policy FIN-RA-07.
Already-announced, public information (e.g., the 2025 refinancing timetable) may be included in DSAR responses; MNPI is excluded or redacted.
Submit requests via the secure portal; role mailbox only: dsar@northwoldcapital.co.uk; do not send ID scans to personal email addresses.
We may ask for a utility bill or driving licence reference [DL No] for verification; do not include full card numbers or security codes.
Council Tax Ref [optional]: CTX-000000-00 (format example only); place of work [department]: [Compliance Operations].
For complaints, use the UK supervisory authority’s public web form or call our helpline 0800 010 1234; no fees are charged for standard DSARs.
Mention of “passport”, “account”, or “insider list” herein includes non-operational placeholders designed to illustrate format, not to solicit sensitive data.
